prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document discusses the processing of personal data related to veterinary and food safety roles, which are applicable in Scotland as part of the devolved agricultural and public health responsibilities. The cooperation with the Scottish Government indicates its relevance.
